qa_pairs.question: What is the initial state of the access list when a shared Globus collection is first created?
qa_pairs.answer: When a shared Globus collection is first created, the access list will only show your account.

qa_pairs.question: How do you add other users or groups to a shared Globus collection after it has been created?
qa_pairs.answer: After creating a shared Globus collection, you can add people or groups by clicking on the 'Add Permissions -- Share With' button from the access list.
